title: Animal Farm
overview: A satirical allegory of revolution and power that traces how a movement for equality is systematically corrupted. As the pigs consolidate control, truth is erased, dissent is crushed and the farm descends into a ruthless dictatorship.

title: Borley Rectory: The Awakening
overview: In 1900, young Reverend Henry Bull and his sister, Kitty, are tasked with taking over the duties of their family home in Essex, a majestic Victorian mansion built on the site of an old monastery. Unaware of the sinister forces that lurk within, the pair are soon confronted by terrifying paranormal activities that threaten their loved ones. Desperate to protect themselves from the demonic intrusion, they call upon the services of a trusted family friend to investigate the origins of the vengeful ghosts which haunt their property. But these are spirits who will not rest, and Borley Rectory is doomed to gain a chilling reputation, as the most haunted house in all of Britain.

title: 森中有林
overview: The story chronicles four decades in the lives of a family deeply rooted in the soil of Northeast China. Through times of prosperity and hardship, they navigate cycles of love and hatred, fortune and misfortune. Though buffeted by the twists of fate, they never relinquish their steadfast guardianship of one another and the profound commitment to this ancestral land that sustains them.

title: Deep Water
overview: A group of international passengers on a flight from Los Angeles to Shanghai is forced to make an emergency landing in shark-infested waters. The terrified group is forced to work together and overcome their differences if they hope to escape their sinking plane and the frenzy of sharks drawn to the wreckage.

title: Swapped
overview: Set in an animal kingdom called the Valley, a tiny woodland creature and a regal bird find themselves in a body-swap mishap. The two sworn enemies are forced to walk in each other’s feathers and fur as they embark on a wild journey together.

title: Raja Shivaji
overview: Chronicles the rise of young Shivaji Bhonsale, who challenged the might of established empires to found the Maratha kingdom and lay the groundwork for “Swarajya” (self-rule) during a turbulent period of Indian history.

title: Casa Grande
overview: A prodigal daughter rejoins her family at their farm during a difficult time, as her ailing father faces both a terminal diagnosis and mounting pressure from competitors. Old wounds resurface as they grapple with what lies ahead.

title: Ek Din
overview: Rohan is in love with his colleague Meera but does not have the courage to express his feelings towards her. He finally gets his chance during the company trip. He makes a wish to be with Meera for just one day, and his wish comes true.

title: Tu Meri Zindagi Hai
overview: A self-destructive, tormented rockstar finds his life and love transformed through an intense romantic journey shaped by music and emotion.

title: 剑来院线剧场版 十三之争
The Double
overview: A short film adapted from one of Fyodor Dostoevsky novels: "The Double";Directed by Youssef Askar set to be released in 2026.

title: Lenin
overview: The life of Russian communist revolutionary, Vladimir Lenin.

title: Phera
overview: Two men share a house and a past that no longer fits them. As city life pulls Priyam forward and age holds his father Pannalal in place, an unexpected return forces them to confront their differences and the quiet truths they have avoided.

title: Fire, Water, Earth, Air
overview: Four stories from the Nordic region paint a picture of a changing natural world, where the elements rage and where being prepared proves to be much more than sandbags and fire extinguishers.

title: An Autumn Summer
overview: Kevin and his girlfriend, Cody, are two months into his family's annual trip at their Northern Michigan home. Amid peaceful days and adventurous nights, Kevin and Cody awaken to reality: This time together will eventually end, and each moment may become a fleeting memory.

title: Miss Universe Philippines 2026
overview: Miss Universe Philippines 2026 will be the seventh edition of the Miss Universe Philippines pageant, scheduled to take place on May 1, 2026, at the SM Mall of Asia Arena in Pasay.

title: Pitt Siyapa
overview: Directed by Rupinder Chahal

title: Infestation
overview: Jason, a man burdened with the care of his abusive, dementia ridden mother, takes a job as an exterminator. He steals something from his client, who turns out to be a witch, and suffers the consequences.

title: Brimstone Terrace
overview: When a depressed public defender ends his own life, he is sentenced to an eternity in Hell. However, after Satan takes notice of his skills, he is offered an afterlife-changing deal that may not fall in line with his own values.

title: Immortal Combat
overview: History's greatest warriors, including Genghis Khan and Joan of Arc, are summoned by a shadowy organization to fight in a battle to the death. But unknown to their captors, the fighters have been plotting to turn the tables and dismantle the deadly enterprise from within.

title: Symbiosis
overview: A weekend reunion at an isolated house turns sinister when old friends realise their host, and the house itself, may want more than their company.

title: Three of a kind
overview: Three friends sign up for a poker match full of intensity, betrayal and money

title: Ajith Kumar - Life Of A Gladiator
Prick
overview: A young drug dealer turned addict must face his greatest fear – his estranged father.

title: Rhapsody, Rhapsody
overview: When Mikio Natsuno obtains a residency certificate, he is stunned to find the name of a woman he has never met listed as his wife. Apparently, he has been "married" for six months without knowing it. Who on earth is the stranger who decided to become his wife? After a frantic search, Mikio finally discovers her—an eccentric young woman with a striking personality who simply says, "I thought I could keep myself together if I were at least married," oﬀering no further explanation. And so, their uneven, unpredictable relationship slowly begins to take shape.

title: Fever Dream
overview: During the hottest days in England's history, lonely teenager Ray falls in love with a beautiful young woman. As they spend the summer together, they come to learn how love can be stronger than anything.

title: Chica
overview: When a girl is tasked with taking a chicken to a nearby restaurant, a curious relationship between the bird and her younger brother comes to life.

title: 猪猪侠大电影之竞速小英雄
Snake Eyes
overview: A police chief performs a dangerous clandestine interrogation against an old friend-slash-officer.

title: A Generation of Men Who Do Not Cry
Bromance Kadhal
overview: In a swipe-right generation, an unromantic boy dares to love the old-school way and proves that staying real is the boldest move of all.

title: Framing Her
overview: A young filmmaker travels across Asia to document independent women directors, but their stories bring her own past to the surface.

title: The Knock
overview: Alone in a crumbling house, a failed filmmaker’s quiet night takes a terrifying turn after a knock at the door forces her to confront everything she tried to forget.

title: The Tower That Built a City
overview: Toronto’s skyline-defining CN Tower launched a five-decade transformation of the Big Smoke into the 6ix.

title: phototropes
overview: Finding accord among the photosensitive inhabitants of Frankfurt's Palmengarten as they absorb, transform and transfer the late summer light.

title: Tourists
overview: Claire navigates through her twisted psyche as she further disassociates into isolation. A chance encounter from an unimaginable source could change it, or can it?

title: How Anxiety Saved My Life
overview: An interactive narrative following a group of detectives hunting down a serial killer - Anxiety!

title: May Day!
overview: May Day! is a feature-length documentary which follows Oxford's thousand-year old tradition of May Morning, the largest celebration of its kind, regularly attracting over 15,000 people each year.  It is a collage-like portrait of the tradition, attempting to find out how the celebration has survived the separation between the land and its people, what the pagan festival means thousands of years after its inception, and how it shapes and contributes to our nation's sense of self.

title: Mr. Mauve
overview: Mr mauve was once a hired gun who did dirty work for the highest bidder. For the last several years he has gone dark and stayed out of trouble. That’s about to change when a previous employer sends a new man to take out Mauve to tie up any loose ends.

title: Parasomnia
overview: Through POV storytelling, Parasomnia follows a data analyst in the 90s whose solitary lifestyle has been derailed by sleep paralysis and constant nightmares. As the nightmares escalate it becomes clear that something is watching – and it's getting closer.

title: The Art Exhibit
overview: A short story about a guy who falls in love with a girl inside of an art exhibit.

title: Capybara
overview: Full animated capybara movie. Plot TBA

title: Senioritis Stirkes! 2: The Final Project
overview: When a new transfer student arrives and rivals Jason's legendary procrastination, the two must face their last chance at graduation.

title: Air
overview: A film-diary that jumps through time and space, and finds emotional connections between various sceneries and situations, which ordinarily would not exist together.

title: Surprise!
overview: Plot unknown.

title: Where I Call Home
overview: Kai, a student and only child with his mentally ill mother, resorts to crime to keep them afloat. With the help of his loyal and hardened childhood friend, Traye, they go on an extortion job that ends in a fatal accident, breaking Kai’s bond to his mother and his home.

title: Sculpture
overview: After a local woman is murdered and martyrized for being queer, a lesbian couple discusses their own fears.

title: Grimace & Cool Nick
overview: Grimace and Cool Nick have to team up to face an existential threat to both of their worlds.

title: Kentucky Roses
overview: A charming romance with a decades-old mystery, set against all the elegance and excitement of Kentucky traditions.

title: Leave the Cat Alone
overview: Plagued by insomnia and lethargy, Mori lets time drift aimlessly, unable to create any meaningful music, all while uneasily sharing a home with his wife, Maiko, a successful and driven photographer. When Mori and his former lover, Asako, reunite by chance and catch up, they confront different versions of the past within their own recalled memories. After they part ways, Asako comes home to a warm meal lovingly prepared by her partner, and a rekindled desire to paint again. At the same time, Mori visits Maiko’s exhibition, and discovers scenes of his own daily life, captured within her affectionate frames.

title: Scenes from Departure
overview: During the turmoil of 2019 Hong Kong, before pursuing his studies in Taiwan, the director was abruptly frozen in the present by a message from his father. As Hong Kong entered a pandemic lockdown, the director, now in Taiwan, began to Skype call his father, unpacking his traumatic memories and their entangled hearts.

title: Baba Kush
overview: Teenagers Max and Uli are old friends and hang out together. When they discover a lonely phone booth, the crowning glory of the evening is clear: hotboxing! But the joint is hardly lit, when a police patrol turns up.  Panicked, the boys barricade themselves in the phone booth. But the officers don’t even think about leaving. They lie in wait, they have time, they call for reinforcements. The escalation of the police quickly becomes a test of endurance for the trapped youths. And the more the night wears on, the more Max and Uli realize that they aren’t really friends any longer.

title: The Metropolitan Opera: Eugene Onegin
overview: Soprano Asmik Grigorian returns to the Met as Tatiana, the lovestruck young heroine in this ardent operatic adaptation of Pushkin, which will be transmitted live from the Metropolitan Opera stage to cinemas worldwide on May 2. Baritone Igor Golovatenko is the urbane Onegin, who realizes his affection for her all too late. The Met’s evocative production, directed by Tony Award–winner Deborah Warner, “offers a beautifully detailed reading of … Tchaikovsky’s lyrical romance” (The Telegraph).

title: The Beast of Riber Castle
overview: Join aspiring Youtubers, John and 'Cameraman', as they investigate the local legend of 'The Beast of Riber Castle'... have the townsfolk of Matlock seen it?  Do they believe in its hypnotic powers?  And what's that coming over the hill, is it a... zombie?

title: BLOODLINE: HUNT OR BE HUNTED
overview: When revenge leaves a trail of bodies behind him, fugitive Tommy Crane is hunted by detectives, bounty hunters, and the very criminal empire he tried to destroy—making him go from the hunter to the prey.

title: Pavements
overview: Finlay and Joe are processing the tragic death of their friend, Luke. But when Finlay's unique coping mechanism becomes too problematic to ignore, a long-avoided conflict forces a confrontation that will change everything.

title: Time of Plenty
overview: Time of Plenty is an essayistic documentary about man-made climate change, Easter Island, and our place in the universe.  Written and directed by Robin Jensen  Narrated by Renate Reinsve  Produced by Mikrofilm AS

title: Shakira no Rio
overview: Calling the entire wolf pack of Brazil! On May 2nd, we will be TODO MUNDO NO RIO for an unforgettable night.

title: Projet Raccourci 2026 par Antoine et Tom
Aimée & Samir
overview: Aimée de Jongh, a renowned comic-book illustrator, travels to Lesbos to conduct research for her new book about Samir, a fictional Syrian boy.

title: I Am With You Now
overview: In the aftermath of a devastating car accident, Alex Vandergraaf must cling to his memory in order to break free from his self-destructive behavior and accept the uncertain beauty of life.

title: The Continuous Machine
overview: The imminent closure of a historic 800-year-old paper mill in Italy signals the irretrievable loss of a centuries-old craft and decades of history erased.

title: 4937 Kilowatts a Year
overview: In a Marrakech call centre, sales calls to France become a profound meditation on voice, distance, and who gets to be heard.

title: Another Day Shall Come
overview: Crushed by their unfolding realities, disembodied anonymous Palestinian voices wander occupied lands, where the dissonance is deafening.

title: Farewell, My Nest
overview: After a deadly fire in a Beijing migrant workers’ housing block in 2017, authorities launched sweeping safety inspections, forcibly evicting residents and demolishing homes. The filmmaker follows workers across urban villages, observing their livelihoods and reflecting on class realities under China’s household registration system.

title: Fletcher Street
overview: The joy and sense of freedom of North Philadelphia at risk youth as they ride horses majestically through the streets of their neighbourhood is as affirming as the trust, discipline and emotional resilience they build through their close bonds with the horses.

title: Itlu Kanmani
overview: Itlu Kanmani follows Rohith, a young man who once dreamed of becoming a filmmaker but leaves everything behind to take care of his ailing father. After his father’s sudden death, Rohith discovers something unexpected that changes the way he sees his father  and his own life.  Haunted by unanswered questions and fragments of the past, Rohith begins a journey to understand a story that was never told to him. As hidden memories slowly unfold, he realizes that some dreams never truly disappear they only wait for the right person to continue them.  With the support of Chaitra, a compassionate doctor who becomes his emotional anchor, Rohith must decide whether to keep running from his past or face a truth that could change his future forever.  Itlu Kanmani is an emotional story about love, sacrifice, and a mystery hidden inside a father’s silent life.

title: Where Clouds Once Formed
overview: This film traces Arizona’s desert as it is reshaped into a hub for data centres and semiconductor manufacturing. Moving through altered waterways, the film exposes tensions between technoutopian visions and drought-stricken ecologies. Guided by offscreen voices and Tohono O’odham poet Ofelia Zepeda’s ‘Cloud Song’, ancestral knowledge counters the rise of industrial ‘cloud’ infrastructures.

title: 72 Hours on Gardraxis
overview: Reunited after 10 years, a father and daughter must reconcile their differences and escape a dangerous alien planet before it's too late

title: A Road Trip to the Moon
overview: Four childhood friends go on a life-changing drive to the moon in a stolen car.

title: Between the Shores
overview: As a long-term migrant caregiver, Fidati shapes Indonesian stories with Taiwanese paper clay. After years of separation during the pandemic, she returns to Central Java in 2024. Laughter and tears intertwine, yet family duty keeps her moving between two lands, where the taste of mangoes bridges emotions across the sea.

title: The Glacier Wedding
overview: In the face of climate calamity, villagers in Pakistan perform a sacred ecological tradition, "marrying" two types of ice to produce a "glacier child."

title: Shulka
overview: Lucila, a shulka from Tafí del Valle destined to care for her mother by ancestral mandate, considers a different life. When he finally dares to ask permission to change the destiny that was imposed on him, his mother has died.

title: Cómo llegar a Cancún
overview: Vera goes through a series of dreams in which she struggles to reach Cancun, a destination that everyone seems to reach easily, but which for her becomes unattainable.

title: PSYCHO KILLER’S PSYCHOTHERAPIST
overview: A strange guy continues to stalk a girl who is ready to fight back.

title: Freestyle
overview: When an incomplete artwork opens up a gateway into an alternate reality, an artist is forced to confront her own artistic process and life choices.

title: The Impossible Dream
overview: After being made fun of at the pub, Quaid attempts to set a Guinness World Record – no matter the price.

title: Showtime Baby
overview: A dysfunctional band loses their frontman 10 minutes before showtime, leaving a teenager to navigating egos, hard drugs and a little death to wrangle them back together. A loud and fast fever dream that interrogates our assumptions on identity and awakens the inner child in us all.

title: Misery and Other Choices
overview: The world sizzles with climate change. A politician lets it burn. A young couple finds out they are pregnant. What should they do if they find the politician alone and barely breathing? A darkly comic drama that asks what will you do when the world is on fire?

title: In Vain
overview: A psychological portrait that delves into the inner disintegration of a woman forced to carry the weight of impossible ideals of self-image, motherhood, and faith.

title: Follow
overview: Alone in a new city, a young man finds solace in keeping in touch with old friends via social media where an unexpected attachment forms as his friends start posting photos of their new-born children.

title: Gabru
overview: A social drama that is a very heart-warming tale which celebrates the undying human spirit. The core plot of the film chronicles the journey of Sunny Deol and a child artist, undergoing troubles in their respective lives.

title: Taco Tuesday
overview: A suburban housewife embarks on a dangerous mission to rescue her captured husband so he isn't late for dinner.

title: Mi Amor
overview: Romy is a French DJ touring the sun-bleached and club-lit Canary Islands, until her friend vanishes. Met with evasion from locals and the authorities, her search leads her to a magnetic stranger and the sinister proprietors of an exotic animal sanctuary.

title: What is Love?
overview: Marguerite has no reason to refuse the church’s annulment of her marriage to Fred. She also has a new partner with whom she has a child. However, to convince the church that their previous marriage was doomed from the start, Marguerite and Fred must examine their shared past.

title: Construction Site
overview: Set within the confines of this exceptional construction site, the film paints a portrait of a miniature society, driven by a common goal: to build cinemas for the next century. From the architect to the journeymen carpenters, from the site manager to the head of the Pathé group, from the designer of the speakers to the future projectionists, the film paints a vivid portrait of this society at a human level.

title: Only Rebels Win
overview: Suzanne and Osmane meet in crisis-ridden Beirut. Osmane is a young Sudanese man without papers, searching for a better future; Suzanne is a widow with Palestinian roots more than twice his age. Against all odds, they fall in love.

title: Unification of Japan 74
overview: With Baba (Akihiko Kuwata) acting as Kyowakai chairman and Sakota (Hideo Nakano) leading the Marugami-kai, both groups begin a new chapter. Kyowakai finalizes long-delayed executive appointments: Hayashida (Ehara Shu) replaces the retired Nakajima as Shikoku block leader, while Hirakawa (Hitomi Matsuda) becomes Tohoku block leader by Baba’s nomination, easing concerns from Himuro (Yasukaze Motomiya), Tamura (Yoshiyuki Yamaguchi), and Ueki (Daisuke Nagakura).  While drinking in Kobe, Baba drunkenly orders Himuro and others to “crush Marugami,” and the remark quickly spreads to Marugami and investigators. Baba then orders a manhunt, but Hirakawa objects and questions why the “Adachi-kai,” a group of delinquent gangs that fled Kyowakai’s control and formed in Tohoku, had been ignored. After being calmed by Himuro, Hirakawa heads to Tohoku to handle the group himself—setting the stage for new tensions involving Baba, Hirakawa, and the Adachi-kai.

title: Almost Us
overview: Two young people navigate friendship, love, and the complicated emotions of a relationship that feels real but may never fully become one.

title: Dejarte, amarte
overview: Carmen returns to the last day she shared with her husband, Eduardo, who died in the Plaza de Mayo bombing, and clings to one last opportunity to torture a memory that she never fully closed.

title: The Birth of Gospel
overview: This episode of Chicago Stories traces the birth and growth of gospel music in Chicago in the 1930s. The story follows "The Father of Gospel", Thomas A. Dorsey, who wrote one of gospel’s early hits while coping with his grief over the death of his wife and child. It explores the roots of gospel from southern spirituals during slavery, through gospel’s early years.

title: Billie Eilish - Hit Me Hard and Soft: The Tour (Live in 3D)
overview: Captured during Billie Eilish's sold-out world tour, a concert experience from one of the most celebrated and successful artists of her generation, presented in immersive 3D.

title: Entity Within
overview: In 1974 LA suburbs, a single mom faces violent attacks by an invisible entity. When no one believes her, she seeks help from paranormal investigators, sparking a notorious documented supernatural case.

title: Kanaval
overview: In the mid-1970s, Rico, a 9-year-old Haitian boy, was brutally torn from his native land  along with Erzulie, his mother, to a strange planet called Canada. Since their arrival, a  distance seems to have grown between mother and son. To regain the love of his mother, Rico will have to understand this New World populated by individuals with strange habits  and customs. Fortunately for him, he can count on Kana, his imaginary friend who comes  straight out of Haitian mythology.

title: Sniper: No Nation
overview: Brandon Beckett and Agent Zero lead a rescue mission in Venezuela when their friends are taken hostage.

title: Tarung: Unforgiven
overview: After unintentionally causing the death of his opponent during a martial arts tournament, Hatta vows to never participate in any fighting tournament again. However, when his only sister becomes seriously ill and requires costly medical treatment, he is offered 'financial assistance' by a head of mobsters in return for Hatta fighting for him in the underworld fighting ring.

title: Shurale
overview: Aysha is preparing for her wedding, but suddenly learns that her brother Timur has disappeared. In search of her brother, the heroine returns to her native village, where she encounters not only her own past, but also a secret hidden in the depths of the forest.

title: Tired of Being a Nerd
overview: Airton used to be the favorite target of jokes and teasing from his classmates during his school years. Years later, when the time comes for the big class reunion party, he is declared the guest of honor. Suddenly revered by his classmates, little does he know the real intentions behind the celebration.

title: 'Ain
overview: Plot under wraps

title: A Fading Man
overview: When her ex-husband reappears, now suffering from dementia and having forgotten their divorce, Hanne’s orderly life with partner Bernd is gently upended.

title: Niñxs
overview: At the foot of Tepozteco, a sacred hill that governs the winds and fertility, lies the small town of Tepoztlán. Against this backdrop, fifteen-year-old Karla's body and mind are undergoing a revolution.

title: Roya
overview: Roya, an Iranian teacher imprisoned in Tehran’s Evin Prison for her political beliefs, is faced with a choice: make a forced televised confession or remain confined to her three-square-metre cell. As past and present slip out of sequence and exchange places, she moves between inner landscapes and lived experience.

title: Whispers in The Shadows
overview: After billionaire Annie Mercer was found dead in her apartment, it's up to hotshot rookie Henry Campbell to figure out who killed her within 24 hours. His suspects? A gardener, An ex-employee, A lawyer, and the victim's sister.

title: Do You Love Me
overview: A playful and personal journey through Lebanon’s audiovisual memory, composed entirely of archival footage. It is a love letter to Beirut, spanning 70 years of film, TV, home videos, and photography, exploring the Lebanese collective psyche – marked by joy and intimacy, destruction and loss. Through the eyes of citizens, filmmakers and artists, the film reconstructs a fragmented history in a country without a national archive, celebrating creative expression as both resistance, renewal and a way to preserve memory.

title: No Sunshine in Here
overview: Karoline is a filmmaker, the daughter of a domestic worker, and embarked on a journey across the country to investigate the relationship between the slave quarters and the maid's room.

title: Khaokala
overview: Stories, truths, lies, fiction.

title: Circus of Life
overview: Wei has a dream that he considers grand, but which those around him see as a naive fantasy. As he struggles between reality and fiction, claiming that he has been abducted by aliens, he risks losing everything that ever mattered to him. In a world caught between fiction and reality, the film chronicles his descent into the fragile confines of a confused mind that cannot escape the circle that holds him prisoner.  Director

title: Iron Maiden: Burning Passion
overview: IRON MAIDEN: BURNING AMBITION explores how Iron Maiden has helped shape a cultural movement, challenging conventional views of rock music and heavy metal’s broader impact on society and culture. Featuring interviews with the band and contributors such as Javier Bardem, Lars Ulrich, and Chuck D, this electrifying film offers an intimate look at their uncompromising vision and unwavering connection with their global army of fans.

title: Inle Echoes
overview: After a devastating earthquake in Myanmar's Nyaung Shwe, lakeside communities confront loss and displacement. Through intimate observation, the film follows residents as they mourn, rebuild and remember. The lake becomes both witness and archive, reflecting resilience and grief after sudden rupture.

title: The Sheep Detectives
overview: George is a shepherd who reads detective novels to his beloved sheep every night, assuming they can't possibly understand. But when a mysterious incident disrupts life on the farm, the sheep realize they must become the detectives. As they follow the clues and investigate human suspects, they prove that even sheep can be brilliant crime-solvers.

title: Remarkably Bright Creatures
overview: A lonely elderly widow named Tova forms an unlikely friendship with a curmudgeonly cephalopod octopus named Marcellus, but unbeknownst to her, Marcellus is on a mission to solve a mystery that will heal the widow’s heart and lead her to a life-changing discovery.

title: Iron Maiden: Burning Ambition
overview: With unprecedented access to the official archives and intimate recollections from the band, both current and past, «Iron Maiden: Burning Ambition» invites fans to experience one of the most iconic journeys in music history.  Spanning five decades, this electrifying documentary charts the band’s rise from the pubs of East London to the world’s biggest stadiums. Featuring exclusive interviews with band members and contributors such as Javier Bardem, Lars Ulrich and Chuck D, as well as all-new animated sequences of the band's legendary mascot, Eddie, the film offers a rare and intimate look at Iron Maiden’s uncompromising vision and unwavering connection with their truly global army of fans.

title: TRAD
overview: From their home in the Donegal Gaeltacht, gifted fiddle player Shóna McAnally and her little brother Mickey take to the road with a troupe of wandering musicians, on a cross-country journey of adventure, romance, and musical exploration.

title: The Irregular at Magic High School THE MOVIE - Yotsuba Succession Arc -
overview: The invitation has arrived. It's time for the New Year's Reception at the Yotsuba family residence. This year, Miyuki and other candidates will gather there to decide who will be the next leader of their powerful clan. If chosen as successor, she would never again have to see her brother live as an outcast. At the same time, such a position would surely entail a political marriage, leaving her mind in complete turmoil. To complicate matters, the current head of the family sows doubt with a shocking statement. When the new year arrives, their relationship may change forever...

title: Mirai
overview: A dedicated teacher attempts to save her abused student from a murder pact with her friend, a plan guided by a cryptic letter from the student's future self.

title: Kyoto Hippocrates
overview: In the late Edo period, when traditional Chinese medicine (Kampo) was mainstream, a Dutch-style Western doctor, Taikichi, devoted himself to treating poor villagers. After saving the life of a rough young man, Shinzaburō, through surgery, the man turned his life around and began training to become a doctor himself. Fifteen years later, having studied the latest medical science in Nagasaki, Shinzaburō returns and joins Taikichi in confronting a suspected outbreak of typhoid fever. Set against the backdrop of a time when Kampo and Western medicine competed for legitimacy, this moving historical drama follows the struggles of doctors who risked everything to save lives during Japan’s medical awakening.

title: Nightmare Hospital
overview: A horror film about a pilot who is the sole survivor of the plane crash in the deep unknown. He must survive in an isolated building where something evil is waiting.

title: Yo no moriré de amor
overview: At 18, Claudia doesn't want to be a hero. Her mother's illness erupts like a silent storm, forcing a redefinition of roles in a family long estranged. Torn between the duty to care for her mother and the desire to live like any other girl her age, Claudia searches for a way to navigate this new reality, which will transform the bonds between the entire family.

title: Non è un paese per single
overview: A brilliant and intelligent love comedy that celebrates second chances and new horizons, starring a strong and determined woman who settles the score.

title: Saptadingar Guptodhon
overview: The fourth film in the Sona Da Collection.

title: Banana: The Whole Bunchy Affair
overview: Ryan Gross' complete cut combining Banana, Bananas, and Banana 3: The Final Stem follows Ben, a man tormented by an incident from his past involving a banana. Will Ben reconcile his past trauma with bananas and learn to coexist with them, or will he be overcome by revenge, and slip into madness?

title: Chardikala
overview: Written by Sapinder SIngh Shergill and Directed by Avneet Singh

title: Little Lamb
overview: After her parents' death, Lily moves into the vacation home they left for her and discovers she's far from alone.

title: Stay Alive. Defy. Overcome
overview: Haunted by a tragic loss, a man is forced into a deadly cat-and-mouse game at the park by an unknown assailant, and must push through a desperate fight in order to survive the night.

title: In The Devil's Den
overview: Five years after a viral apocalypse leaves the world ruled by worshipped horrors, three brothers hiding in a secluded Louisiana cabin are forced to confront the outside world when a stranger arrives at their door.

title: Sweet New Suit
overview: This film takes place within the lives of two friends that conflict with one another, as "Q" can't take responsibility for his actions and loosely getting "Jazz" involved.

title: Suffs
overview: Created by Tony Award winner Shaina Taub, this musical recorded from Broadway tells the story of the American suffragist movement and the remarkable friendships, heartbreak, and action that brought women together—or, in some cases, tore them apart. The ensemble cast features Taub as Alice Paul, Tony winner Nikki M. James as Ida B. Wells, Tony nominee Jenn Colella as Carrie Chapman Catt, and Grace McLean as President Woodrow Wilson.

title: Where Are You Alice?
overview: In a "potential" future, the True Purity Act is enacted in the U.S.A. for "societal protection" forcing all declared vagabonds to be removed from the streets and forced into special rehabilitative facilities. THIS IS ONE OF THEIR STORIES…

title: Indian Institute of Zombies
overview: Plot TBA; set on an elite engineering campus, weaving together zombie horror, youth comedy and social satire.

title: CRAWL. SUCK. KILL. 2. JINGLE. BELLS.
overview: A masked figure breaks into a house one Christmas, only to encounter a creature

title: Mare Sapiens
overview: Below the surface, the alien is us. Filmed entirely underwater with natural light and ambient sound, MARE SAPIENS moves through the Bay of Marseille as a space where living forms, infrastructures, and machines coexist. The film assembles a sensory field without commentary or hierarchy, letting the sea appear not as background or resource, but as a milieu that absorbs, resists, and persists.

title: The Water Buffalo
overview: Mai Gang, the father of the filmmaker, starts making a map, which over the weeks invades the floor of the family living room. The itinerary of his clandestine escape from Communist China to Hong Kong in the seventies resurfaces. From the making of a homemade buoy to sea swimming techniques, this film offers a unique survival guide.

title: Love Bites
overview: After a young peasant is spurned by her vampiric lover, she embarks on a blood-soaked odyssey that spans centuries.

title: When the Room Listens
overview: Ambitious actress Ngozi lands a coveted theater role, but as she navigates auditions and mentorship under the enigmatic Mr. Potter. With this her reality begins to fracture. Haunted by the presence of Zoe and consumed by obsessive rituals, she confronts the thin line between artistic ambition and psychological unraveling.

title: Together in Song: A Community in Music
overview: How does being in a choir benefit different phases of peoples lives? From being in school, to adult life after school, to elderly life, this documentary shows light on how people can continue to make music and be in a community, such as a choir.

title: Water in the Balance
overview: Though Taiwan's rainfall is three times the global average, its uneven distribution creates striking scarcity. Water gives and takes; it sustains life yet brings destruction. Following the sound of currents, the film reflects on water's shifting states, capturing the emotional and spiritual ties woven between people, memory and the surrounding tides.

title: Sword Art Online: Unanswered//butterfly
overview: The world’s first full-dive VRMMO, Sword Art Online—known as SAO. What was meant to be a dream come true has instead transformed into a deadly game where dying in the virtual world means dying in reality. Emirun and Rex, who once knew each other in the real world, reunite by chance within SAO. They join a scouting party to learn how to survive in this unforgiving world. One day, however, they encounter a mysterious PK known only as the Black Swordsman. When Emirun rushes to the scene, she finds Rex collapsed in despair, and the Black Swordsman standing over him. The one who wiped out their entire scouting party... was the Black Swordsman! Determined to avenge their fallen comrades, Emirun and Rex seek out the legendary prodigy swordswoman Asuna, and begin intense training under her guidance. In a death game where even players turn against one another, what new beginning will these two reach at the end of their struggle…?

title: dawn
overview: Torn between the girl he loves and the future he’s always dreamed of, a boy must make the difficult decision of whether he should leave or stay.

title: The Good Assassin
overview: A naive contract killer becomes the roommate of his apathetic target, who he must find the strength to dispose of by the end of the week or face the wrath of the highest authorities of the criminal underworld.

title: Stories About My Body
overview: In a tiny theatre in Aotearoa, New Zealand, four teenage stagehands work tirelessly to help Morgana tell the stories that shaped her - from her own teenagehood in 1998, to working foot-fetish parties in New York City, to falling in love and later birthing her babies in a Melbourne living room.  By turns vulnerable and riotously funny, she moves from lamenting her chins to marvelling at her cellular functions, using her body as the living template for every tale she tells.  Created and performed by Morgana O'Reilly (The White Lotus) and co-directed with her husband and real-life birth partner, 2025 BAFTA nominee Peter Salmon (After The Party), Stories About My Body blends nudity, heart-swelling honesty and real birth footage into a stand-up comedy special like no other - intimate, fearless and unexpectedly profound.

title: THE CLOSING SHIFT
overview: The main character has to close at his job, everything is normal until he has to go to the storage room.  This short film will be presented at the 2026 HOCO Film Fest!

title: Peace for Nina
overview: The story of Nina Branovytska, the mother of Ukrainian soldier Ihor Branovytskyi, one of the defenders of Donetsk Airport. In 2015, Ihor was captured during the withdrawal from the airport, he was tortured and executed by a leader of pro-Russian militants while being in captivity.

title: Les ondes déferlantes
overview: Radio Galère, an independent radio station in Marseille, has been on the air for over 40 years, giving voice to what we hear far too little of: the anger, the struggles, the hopes, and the stories of those whom society renders invisible in their daily lives. Through its volunteers and staff, the station is a place where speaking out becomes a political act and a tool for empowerment.

title: Ubelka
overview: Zéïr, a historian of the future, travels up the Huveaune in search of impressions. Driven by a desire to better understand the river, she meets people who ease her concerns. Since the narrative of the Huveaune has long been dominated by male voices, Zéïr hopes to construct a different, more fluid one.

title: The Alfred Show Movie
overview: After twenty years in prison, Alfred Pertile is able to escape with the help of his old friend, Mark Bradley. With his newfound freedom, Alfred has a choice to make. Will he choose revenge, or forgiveness...

title: Ann Wilson – In My Voice
overview: Chronicles the life and career of the HEART lead singer. It features intimate, in-her-own-words storytelling, utilizing personal archives, home movies, and journals to explore her five-decade journey as a trailblazing rock vocalist.

title: Into Sound
overview: A conceited guitarist, insecure about his mark in the world of music, isolates himself in his apartment to write a masterpiece. But as time passes and inspiration wears thin, his sanity spirals, and his body undergoes an unexpected transition.

title: Captive
overview: Tyler Edward's first feature film. A Horror/Sci-Fi that follows journalist Nicki Quinn as she documents a married couple’s monumental extra-terrestrial science experiment.

title: It's Time to Grow Up
overview: In a secluded castle, Margaret, a highly sensitive young girl, lives peacefully with her mother, Helen. On the evening of her twentieth birthday, Helen invites Margaret's grandmother, Agatha, for dinner. As the sun sets and the young girl lies on a tablecloth in the garden, a phrase written in an open notebook beside her, once whispered by her grandmother, suddenly catches her attention: "It's Time to Grow Up".

title: Amityville Rex
overview: The Amityville curse goes prehistoric. A dinosaur is resurrected and demonically possessed, unleashing a new terror on Amityville. A priest, a cop, and a criminal fugitive come together to exorcise the dino and stop the carnage.

title: Zanni
overview: A period drama set between Scotland and Italy.

title: Marty, Life Is Short
overview: The definitive documentary on comedian Martin Short, streaming on Netflix on May 12.

title: The Punisher: One Last Kill
overview: As Frank Castle searches for meaning beyond revenge, an unexpected force pulls him back into the fight.

title: Midnight Girls
overview: Four Filipina entertainers in Nagoya, Japan form a sisterhood while facing the emotional cost of their jobs. Together, they must decide what they are truly willing to sacrifice for their dreams in a foreign land.

title: Vanilla
overview: In the late 80s Mexico, a family made up of seven women from different generations and ideologies fights to save the house in which they live and which they are about to lose due to an outstanding debt. We see the story through the eyes of the youngest, Roberta (8), as she embarks on a journey of self-discovery, which impacts the rest of the family.

title: Asad
overview: A slave in 19th Century Egypt revolts against his masters for equal rights for slaves to live freely.

title: Good Omens 3
overview: The conclusion to the Good Omens story.

title: Yang Lain Boleh Hilang Asal Kau Jangan
overview: Kesha, a final-year film student, lives in a warm family with her mother who also her beloved teacher, Yuke. However, their lives change when Yuke begins to experience increasingly severe memory loss. Amidst this, Kesha is faced with a major dilemma, continue pursuing her dreams or return home to avoid missing out on moments with her mother before it's too late.

title: The Call
overview: Inspired by a visit with Orlando’s vibrant Moroccan community, Central Florida “arts instigator” Terry Olson travels to Rabat to uncover the human stories behind the 1975 Green March—when 350,000 unarmed Moroccan civilians crossed into the Western Sahara, prompting Franco’s Spain to relinquish its colonial claim. Through firsthand accounts and historical reflection, Olson and Moroccan director Ahmed Bouchalga explore the legacy of that pivotal moment and the decades of regional tension that followed. Olson also delves into the enduring, little-known bond between Morocco and the United States, whose diplomatic relationship stretches back to 1777, when Morocco became the first nation to recognize American independence. Timely and illuminating, this powerful documentary reflects on one nation’s struggle for independence amid the global pressures of decolonization, and the lasting lessons that continue to resonate today with those who choose to heed the call of freedom.

title: Maid Robot 2
overview: A ruthless tech CEO threatens to steal the Maid Robot secret plans and chaos ensues.

title: In the Grey
overview: When a ruthless despot steals a billion-dollar fortune, a covert team of elite operatives who live in the global shadows, as comfortable wielding power and influence as they are automatic weapons and high explosives, is sent to steal it back on what would be for anyone else a suicide mission. What begins as an impossible heist gets much worse, spiraling into an all-out war of strategy, deception and survival.

title: Karuppu
overview: In a world where justice falters, a powerful guardian awakens. A superhuman rises in a rotten world to set things right in this high-octane fantasy entertainer.

title: Gepellte Haut
overview: Four young people from Berlin decide to spend their summer in Portugal. They throw away their smart phones, open up their relationships and try to free themselves from any social norms. But just as their utopia comes true, a devastating forest fire breaks out around them.

title: Ein Münchner im Himmel
overview: When cab driver Ludwig “Wiggerl” Brunner, a true Munich bon vivant, is hit by a streetcar and ends up in heaven, there is only one way back to his beloved Bavaria: he has to improve his karma balance as quickly as possible.

title: Your Own Board
overview: A strict physics teacher tries to dissuade her teenage son from leaving school and becoming a professional skateboarder. She makes a bet with him that if he competes in a major skateboarding competition, he will stay in school. Under the guidance of her failing student, she learns to skate, unaware that she is putting her career and reputation at risk.

title: Antartica - Quasi una fiaba
overview: A small group of scientists, unreachable for eight months, explores the future of humanity. Maria Medri, a foreign genius, arrives in Antarctica, challenging Fulvio Cadorna's plans. They are similar but conflicting, as everyone desires their own. This scientific, ideological, and emotional conflict unfolds.

title: Mollywood Times
overview: Vineeth Madhavan, a teenager hailing from Kuttikkanam who aspires to direct films. This coming-of-age comedy serves as an antithesis to the umpteen love letters written to cinema since the beginning of time.

title: Narcisa's Will
overview: Haunted by memories of her recently deceased mother, former star Narcisa, Ana decides to sell the childhood mansion she inherited and share the proceeds with her brother, Diego. However, the grim cleansing process reveals a legacy quite different from what she imagined.

title: The Cowboy
overview: Ten years in the life of young cowboy Crowley as he comes of age in the vastness of Colorado. On his rocky path, he endures loss, separation, and shattered dreams.

title: Conni and the Mystery of the Crane
overview: While her parents are traveling, Conni experiences an exciting adventure at home with cat Mau, her friends, Grandpa Willi, a stuffy neighbor – and an injured crane, who urgently needs help. Will Conni and her friends manage to get crane Klaus to fly south with the migrating birds in time?

title: Enquanto o Céu Não Me Espera
overview: A simple farmer, attached to the memories of his father, struggles to stay with his family on their small farm, despite the difficulties imposed by the flooding of the Amazon rivers.

title: Лео и Тиг. Дорога на Байкал
overview: Leo and Tig set off on a long journey to Lake Baikal to bring home the lost seal, Luffy. Along the way, they meet new friends: the red panda Ju and the monkey king Wukong, and also encounter the evil horse herd leader Tengri Khan, who dreams of capturing the seal himself. After all, whoever returns Luffy will be rewarded with any wish granted by the master of Lake Baikal, the great dragon Lusuda.

title: Булгаков. Тайна мастера
overview: Biographical film about Mikhail Bulgakov.

title: Sometimes, I Imagine Them All at a Party
overview: Soberly and with restraint, the director reconstructs the attempted femicide she survived fourteen years before. Intense conversations with people from her past provide an external perspective on an act subjectively and objectively impossible to grasp.

title: Mortal Kombat II
overview: The fan favorite champions—now joined by Johnny Cage himself—are pitted against one another in the ultimate, no-holds barred, gory battle to defeat the dark rule of Shao Kahn that threatens the very existence of the Earthrealm and its defenders.

title: Is God Is
overview: Two sisters embark on an epic quest for revenge, confronting a charged family history that pushes them to extraordinary lengths.

title: Maa Inti Bangaram
overview: Samantha plays a newly married woman who visits her in laws' house. The family appears normal and traditional, but something is off. They underestimate her, not knowing that she carries a violent past and has come with a clear mission.

title: LifeHack
overview: Four teenage slackers attempt a multi-million-dollar Bitcoin heist from their bedrooms, only to spiral into the darkest corners of the internet-and a danger beyond their computer screens.

title: Pizza movies
overview: In the midst of a professional crisis, a couple decides to leave everything behind and start a new business.

title: God of Mischief
overview: When a cheeky 10-year-old boy sets his sights on playing Loki in the school play, his over-the-top confidence costs him the role, but he hatches a mischievous plan to prove he's the real god of mischief after all.

title: Magic Hour
overview: Erin and Charlie escape to the desert to navigate an unexpected and challenging new phase of their relationship.

title: Forge
overview: In Miami, siblings Raymond and Coco Zhang’s art forgery ring flourishes when they encounter a disgraced millionaire in need of their expertise. Meanwhile, FBI Art Crimes agent Emily Lee moves to Miami to investigate a series of mysterious paintings.

title: Patlabor EZY File 1
overview: Patlabor EZY File 1 is the first of a 3-part theatrical series taking place in 2036, 38 years after the events of Patlabor on Television and The New Files. Set in the TV continuity, this new production does not take place in the same timeline as the Patlabor film series or live-action drama.

title: All That We Inherit
overview: After their mother’s death, estranged siblings Nina and Gagan return to their childhood home in North Goa. As routines resume and decisions loom, their opposing ways of grieving surface, forcing them to confront loss, belonging, and what it means to move on.

title: 映画『正直不動産』
overview: An elite real estate agent who lost the ability to lie due to a curse must navigate the cutthroat industry using only the honest truth.

title: CN Adventures: The Movie
overview: The film’s plot follows C and N are going on their crazy adventures, discovering new items, meeting people, etc. until the inverted versions of C and N came to destroy the original ones.

title: Scream Lives
overview: In this Scream fan film set in a new town, Ardenwood, the lives of multiple high schoolers interweave in disembodied stories terrorized by a local Ghostface killer.

title: Kaïros
overview: After a year of filming abroad, Manu, a once prominent actor, returns to his hometown. But getting back into the business isn't as easy as he thought. After several unsuccessful auditions, he's no longer sure of anything. Against all odds, he lands a job hosting a nighttime call-in radio show. His listeners are mainly newcomers, refugees and exiles with varied life experiences, working graveyard shifts. Manu gradually appropriates this space, this gathering of mixed voices, to launch philosophical questions into the night. His words are engaging. He becomes an anchor for many listeners. His life takes on new meaning.

title: A Guardian's Heart
overview: Jake Bishop has been an exemplary Executive Protection Medic with a distinguished career but life hasn't always been that way for him. There have been miscues, failures, wrong turns and one day he just decides to walk away from it all. His ex boss wants to hire him for one final mission together and when Jake senses redemption for all life's twist and turns, will they survive and can the thought of love save him just in time from a path of destruction. Only time will tell.

title: Perfume - "Cold Sleep" –25 years Document-
overview: As 2026 heralds the start of technopop group Perfume's 'cold sleep' hiatus, this documentary traces the first 25 years of their career, and is expected to go behind the scenes of their latest album, Nebula Romance, and their latest tours.

title: 8v40
overview: A quirky, unlucky-in-love bachelor volunteers for a secret teleportation experiment, only to find himself transported across the world to the Philippines, where he accidentally disrupts the life of a woman he's been trying to woo online.
Two high schoolers and four young adults in a small town begin experiencing strange occurrences and disappearances.

title: LA PALOMA
overview: Known as ‘Pa Nana’, a celebrated Latin singer in 1950s–60s Taiwan, Kao Chu-hua supported her family through nightclub performances after her father’s execution during the White Terror. Drawing on family testimonies and newly declassified archives, the film reconstructs her life under state surveillance, revealing survival beneath authoritarian rule and enforced silence.

title: Daughter of Nectar
overview: Daughter of Nectar, a gracefully carved marble nude from 1921 by Huang Tu-shui, Taiwan's inaugural modern sculptor, encapsulates a complex century of Taiwanese history, spanning from Japanese colonisation to Chiang Kai-shek's authoritarian rule and the White Terror era. This sculpture, both delicate and resilient, stands as a silent sentinel, mirroring the enduring struggles, suppressed voices, and profound cultural transformations of its homeland.

title: STREAKERS
overview: An exclusive behind-the-scenes featurette giving a look into the production of STREAKS (2025). Deleted scenes, outtakes and never-before-seen media all wrapped up in one killer package.

title: As We Burn
overview: It begins at the margins of power: a few teenagers protest outside parliament, cardboard signs in hand and an unyielding determination in their eyes. From there, Helena Molin’s long-term portrait unfolds—of a generation forced early on to confront the ruthlessness of politics. Their fight for the climate and for justice runs parallel to a life that should be about friendship, play, and future dreams, but is repeatedly interrupted by the failures of the adult world. The result is an intimate and powerful depiction of what happens when moral responsibility is placed in the hands of those still searching for their place in the world.

title: Tokyo In 33 RPM
overview: A musical journey through Tokyo's Jazz Cafes.

title: Not Another Rockstar
overview: Bernie searches for a desperate solution of her dating problems.

title: Disco Hall Commitments
overview: "(...)the most important event of my day has been remembering the improbable adventure of H.K: 5000 years after the first kalaallit expedition, renowned and reviled archaeologist Herbjørg Kristofferson tries to lift up an ambitious budget for a reckless expedition to the Secret Pavilion of Monk Ko-Hu, near the Russian Arctic"

title: REINCARNATION
overview: A young man haunted by déjà vu uncovers a series of mysterious clues that lead to a voice insisting rebirth is the only path to peace.

title: STRAIGHT EDGE
overview: Desperate to escape his dead-end life, Matt (Chris Lovejoy) recruits his derelict friends to rob the neighborhood mob's card game. With his crew's reputation on the line, Denicio (Joe Graziano) is tasked with hunting down the trio and finding the money. Matt is forced to choose between his past or a life with the woman he loves.

title: The Quiet After
overview: In a near-future society where grief is erased by law, Noah wakes up with fragments of an unknown woman after a near-fatal accident. Drawn into therapy and reassured by a trusted friend, he begins to piece together the unbearable truth. His search for her, and for himself, becomes an act of defiance against a world that values compliance over love.  Haunted by memory and hunted by the system, Noah is forced to confront the cost of remembering, and the deeper cost of letting go.

title: Ronda Rousey vs. Gina Carano
overview: Legendary MMA trailblazers Ronda Rousey and Gina Carano return to the cage for a highly anticipated super fight.

title: Plants
overview: After a ecological collapse a scientist narrates over footage of the plants humanity lost in hopes of warning any future civilization that may be lucky enough to exist in a world with plants.

title: The Long Way to Tipperary
overview: A man returns home.

title: I LOVE TO RUN
overview: When a wannabe running influencer's career is interrupted by an insidious call to something greater, he loses himself to curiosity and ambition.

title: The Yearbook: Waiting for the Teacher
overview: In May 1980, students at Shinheung High in Jeonju rallied to end martial law. To shield them, the vice principal imposed school penalties, earning the label of a hypocrite. Students resisted with boycotts, and two years later, tensions flared into arson. After 42 years, a teacher and students seek reconciliation.

title: W.E.B. Du Bois: Rebel With a Cause
overview: Explore the life and legacy of notable Black scholar and civil rights pioneer W.E.B. Du Bois. From his birth, just five years after the Emancipation Proclamation; to his death, on the eve of the March on Washington in 1963, his legacy as an activist continues to resonate today.

title: What Remains... - A Walking Dead Story
overview: Inspired by the hit show 'The Walking Dead', A Year after the Wildfire Virus attacked the nation, two teenagers, Aaron and Lara, traverse through the deserted, walker-infested countryside of England when they come across another survivor. Will they be able to trust this new foe? Or will they become one of them?  Fanmade Short film written and directed by A.B Morey.

title: The Spider-Thony Movie 3
overview: Anthony has been going crazy for 3 years figuring out the mystery of his dead brother. All for the killer to be someone he wasn’t expecting.

title: When the Hallways Go Quiet
overview: On the night before graduation at Portage Northern High School, four friends Carmen, Vig, Ace, and Aanya walk through the quiet halls of their school one last time. When they stop outside their classroom, they decide to sit together and talk about their memories from the past four years, remembering the moments that made their high school life special. As they reflect, scenes from the lives of other seniors appear in montages, showing the many experiences shared by the Class of 2026. When they finally leave the classroom, Vig pauses and sees a group of younger students running in, ready to begin their own journey. In that moment, he realizes that while their time at the school is ending, a new chapter is just beginning for others.

title: Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu
overview: The evil Empire has fallen, and Imperial warlords remain scattered throughout the galaxy. As the fledgling New Republic works to protect everything the Rebellion fought for, they have enlisted the help of legendary Mandalorian bounty hunter Din Djarin and his young apprentice Grogu.

title: Colony
overview: Se-jeong, a biotechnology professor, attends a biotech conference—only to witness it spiral into catastrophe when a rapidly mutating virus is unleashed. As the outbreak spreads and the infected begin to transform, authorities seal off the entire facility, trapping the survivors with an ever-growing threat.

title: Tom Clancy's Jack Ryan: Ghost War
overview: Operating in real time with lives on the line and the threat escalating at every turn, Jack reunites with battle-tested CIA operative Mike November and former CIA boss James Greer. Their combined experience is the only edge they have against an enemy who knows their every move. Backed by an unlikely new partner – razor-sharp MI6 officer Emma Marlowe – Jack and the team navigate a treacherous web of betrayal, facing a past they thought was long put to rest.

title: Love Battle
overview: After a breakup, Tan Jie clashes with love-idealist Ji Xiaode at work. As rivals turn allies, two wounded hearts must decide: dare to love again?

title: Be Yourself
overview: Wu Xiao Bei, a girl born in the 2000s, suffered from a sudden breakup. After falling out of love, she repeatedly jumped into madness and decadence and finally decided to fight back! Xiao Bei stumbled through the "12 things not to do after falling out of love": transform yourself, pretend to be rational, and deal with all kinds of people from the opposite sex... However, can this long list of tips for a lovelorn really lead her out of her heartbreak?

title: Sealed in Scars
overview: How many marks remain on a predestined body? Born and raised in the macumba tradition of Imperatriz, the young priest Carlos Lourenço reflects on a path of pain and learning.

title: InvaZion!
overview: Denaé, Fousey, and Remy plan to hit what they believe is an empty house, but when the homeowner unexpectedly returns, Fousey makes a split-second decision and one simple impulsive action changes the lives of everyone. Remy, known for her brilliant strategies, becomes tangled into a brawl with Fousey. Tensions boil over as Denaé finally witnesses the same treatment that was done unto her. When Fousey threatens Remy’s life, Denaé is finally forced to pick a side.

title: Cabinet
overview: Cabinet (2026)  Genre: Mystery, Thriller, Science Fiction  In a shadowy, bureaucratic organization known only as The Workplace, recruits are subjected to a ritual of initiation involving a mysterious cabinet—an anomaly that assigns them a partner whose identity is inexplicably implanted into their minds. The process, shrouded in secrecy, is designed to minimize accidents in the field. But when one recruit lingers inside for an unprecedented 48 seconds, seasoned agent Alice begins to question everything she thought she understood about her job.  As Alice and her new recruit navigate a world of hidden threats, underground dealings, and inexplicable phenomena, a desperate search leads Alice to confront the limits of knowledge, safety, and certainty.  Blending existential horror with a noir-infused investigative thriller, Cabinet is a chilling descent into the boundaries of reality and the cost of uncovering hidden truths.

title: Flieg steil
overview: Konnie, a respected musician in the right-wing scene, loses her reputation when she incorporates feminist and queer content into her music. In order to rehabilitate herself, she uses the outsider punk Rudi, who wants to attack a Nazi pub. But both end up fighting a battle for belonging - who will be left standing?

title: Passenger
overview: A few weeks into their van-life adventure, a young couple witnesses a horrific accident that leaves the driver dead. Soon they're being pursued by a demonic stalker who's impossible to outrun and follows them wherever they go.

title: Bogatyrs
overview: Ancient Rus. The hero Svyatogor defeated the evil Sorcerer who wanted to conquer Rus - to do this, he used magic to turn into a Dragon. Svyatogor hid three artifacts (the claw, eye, and vein of the Dragon) in the modern world so that evil would never return. But because of the schoolboy Vanya, the Sorcerer's beloved enters our time. She wants to find these artifacts, resurrect the Dragon, and bring her betrothed back to life. Together with two heroes from ancient Rus, Vanya must find the villain and prevent her from carrying out her plan.

title: Drishyam 3
overview: Georgekutty is not just protecting his family from the world, he is protecting them from the truth, and from the burden of what binds them together. Now, as new forces begin to close in, more organized and determined than ever before, the cracks in his carefully built calm start to widen. The threat is no longer just external; it presses against his conscience, his relationships, and the fragile normalcy he has tried so hard to create. And as the walls slowly tighten around him and his family, how much more is Georgekutty willing to sacrifice.

title: Home Entertainment
overview: Florian and Marie want to spend a cozy evening on the sofa watching a movie. But that's more difficult than expected: the couple navigate through a digital world full of streaming portals, voucher codes, delivery service apps and broken remote controls and keep tripping over themselves in the process.

title: Not Home Alone 3
overview: Masha encounters the insidious Nanny again. But now the villain has a new ally - the charming swindler Anton. At stake is the school graduation! Together with her friend Yegor, Masha must stop the criminals and save the most important evening of the year.

title: The Curse Of Black Pond
overview: A group of teenagers go to an old house on vacation with a big black pond, what they don't know is that a long time ago, a witch was drowned and killed there and now she's back for revenge, on those who live in her house.

title: Para Vigo Me Voy!
overview: A Documentary about the Brazilian Filmmaker Carlos Diegues and His Works.

title: The Fall of the Nighthawk
overview: At a diner, seasoned killer "The Nighthawk" (Liam Snyder) stares death right in the face...as three assassins compete to see who can kill him first.

title: Quem tem com que me pague, não me deve nada
Gen 25"
overview: Experience a study tour through this documentary, which follows the Class of 2025 from The British School Punta Arenas on their journey through the United Kingdom.

title: I Love Boosters
overview: A crew of professional shoplifters known as The Velvet Gang take aim at a cutthroat fashion maven.

title: Finding Emily
overview: When a lovesick musician is given the wrong number for his dream girl, he teams up with a driven psychology student to find her. Together, they spark a hilarious campus-wide frenzy that tests their own hearts and ambitions along the way.

title: Infiltrate
overview: In a city overrun by crime, government agent Lily Chen is forced to choose between her duty and her family when her husband is kidnapped, and she’s blackmailed into assassinating high-level criminals to save him.  As she delves deeper into the criminal underworld, Lily’s relentless pursuit of justice unravels a web of corruption, leading to a final, life-altering decision that will change her world forever.

title: Corporate Retreat
overview: Blending the dread of survival horror with dark laughs and shocking twists, "Corporate Retreat" centers around a group of young executives whose luxury team-building trip descends into a bloody fight for survival against a vengeful retreat leader.

title: Monkey In A Cage
overview: TV star Samar's life spirals when his ex Gayatri accuses him of rape after he blocks contact with her. Despite his new relationship with Khushi, he faces arrest and encounters a corrupt justice system.

title: ミステリー・アリーナ
overview: Six contestants compete in a high-stakes live TV quiz show to solve a complex "closed-circle" murder mystery for a 10 billion yen jackpot.

title: Nameless
overview: The story begins with an indiscriminate slaughter at a cafe frequented by young people. Security camera footage shows an unarmed man with shaven head, able to seemingly kill people with a simple touch. Police investigation leads to the suspected identity of the murderer: middle-aged man named Tarō Yamada. When the police conduct a search of his apartment, they find the rotting corpse of a woman.  Adapted from Sato Jiro's own debut manga.

title: Amalgam
overview: Helen is a visual artist who isolates herself in a house to prepare for a new artistic project. Her solitude is disrupted when her wife, Angela, returns from a trip. However, Helen begins to experience hallucinations and growing paranoia, leading her to question whether the woman in her house is truly Angela or an imposter.

title: Moon Walk
overview: Following the journey of close friends who celebrate life through music and dance.

title: Ask E. Jean
overview: Chronicles E. Jean Carroll's life, trailblazing work and legal battles.

title: Passage en caisse
overview: Like every week, Victor, 24, goes grocery shopping, but he can't find a certain item. The problem is he has an uncontrollable shyness...

title: Missoula
overview: Montana 1998. The lives of a wide kaleidoscope of characters intertwine in a dramatic fashion as the romance between Clara-Belle and Rebecca tightens.

title: Vengeance Rising
overview: Andrew Vengeance is determined to stop the MIC from attacking their city and knows they need a strong team to counter the CIA's threat.

title: The Barn Part III
overview: Years after the events of 'The Barn Part II', the group is still left in fear that the evil three might come back to finish the harvest once and for all.

title: Saligia
overview: After the apocalypse on Earth, seven people find themselves in an unknown space without any memories of who they are, or how they got there. One of them is convinced that they are all in her dream, from which she is trying to wake up by all means.

title: Marigold 2nd Anniversary Show: Shine Forever 2026 ~A Glorious Celebration!~
overview: Shine Forever 2026 ~A Glorious Celebration!~ was a professional wrestling event promoted by Dream Star★Fighting Marigold. It took place on May 23, 2026, at EBARA WAVE Arena Ota in Tokyo, Japan, in commemoration of the second anniversary of Marigold's debut show.

title: Mosquito Halo
overview: Police investigate Dream Harvester, a political faction opposing the digitization of consciousness.

title: Ink Between the Lines
overview: After the devastating suicide of her best friend Coli, 15 year old Natalie turns to journaling to cope with her overwhelming grief. Struggling with guilt and isolation, she pours her emotions onto the page and joins a support group for teens. A deep conversation with Ezra, a friend who understands silent pain, inspires her to transform her journal entries into a novel. As Natalie writes, she begins to confront hidden truths about her friendship with Coli, unspoken struggles, and the weight of what was left unsaid. Through storytelling, she finds healing, connection, and the courage to speak the truth—not just for herself, but for others who need to hear it.

title: Portrait In Red
overview: A mysterious guest arrives at a dinner party during a pivotal moment in an artist's career.

title: AEW Double or Nothing 2026
overview: The 2026 Double or Nothing was a professional wrestling pay-per-view produced by All Elite Wrestling (AEW) that took place on May 24, 2026, at Louis Armstrong Stadium in New York City, New York, USA.

title: Night of The Abandoned City
overview: A spin-off from the Abandoned city movie focusing on the mysterious man and his son in the night of the Abandoned city

title: Be Still, My Daughter
overview: A Five Nights at Freddy's Fan-Film - After years of planning and building, Henry Emily finishes building his new animatronic, built to capture his long-lost daughter who lives inside of the Marionette - all a part of his plan to finally end the years of ruin and chaos that William Afton has caused...

title: Onades
overview: Álvaro returns to his Mediterranean hometown to sell the family house. There, the Mediterranean comes alive and guides him through legends, customs and memories, on an intimate journey where past and present intertwine. Onades is a contemporary fable about identity, nostalgia and desire, a poetic and queer short film created from and for La Vila.

title: Shocktopus
overview: An alien amoeba crashes to Earth and mutates aquatic life along the shores of North Carolina, unleashing an electrified octopus that terrorizes a seaside resort. Two special operatives try to stop the shock wave of cosmic carnage.

title: Golden Bullet
overview: A crime thriller story set in Serbia.

title: Mata
overview: Wounded while on a clandestine operation in Niger, French secret agent Mata loses track of her colleague Antoine, captured on the spot. Upon her return, she volunteers for a counter-espionage mission in the Alps, with the intuition that this new assignment might somehow be connected to her traumatic mission in Africa. Haunted by Antoine’s captivity and convinced that her managers are hiding information from her, Mata embarks on a race against time, outside any official framework... at the risk of losing everything.

title: Suamiku Lukaku
overview: This film tells the story of a woman who endures a life full of wounds, both physical and emotional. She then struggles to escape the clutches of domestic violence and finds the courage to speak out, reflecting the thousands of women who silently endure similar suffering.

title: Strung
overview: A talented violinist whose prestigious new role as a music tutor for an enigmatic, elite family spirals into a psychological battle for her safety and sanity.

title: It’s All Good
overview: After taking care of his intrusive mother for years, Elie is relieved: she is cured. He can finally focus on his own life and falls in love… until his mom’s relapse. Now he has to take care of both the women in his life!

title: Dance of the Damned
overview: From the universe of Qodrat (2022).

title: Children of Heaven
overview: Two siblings, Ali and Zahra, who agreed to keep the matter of Zahra's missing shoes a secret, which Ali had brought in for repair. To solve the problem, they decided to share Ali's worn-out shoes. Zahra would wear them in the morning during her school schedule, and after returning home, she would run as fast as she could so Ali could wear them to school in the afternoon. New hope emerged when Ali learned of an inter-school running competition with a prize of a pair of shoes for the third-place winner. Ali signed up, determined to win the competition so he could buy Zahra new shoes.

title: Keu Bole Biplobi, Keu Bole Dakat
overview: A biopic of Ananta Singha. Some calls him dacoit, some calls him a rebellion. This adaptation gives the viewer a chance to know him as a whole, a person and as a revolutionary communist leader.

title: Khan Tumhara
overview: A genre blend of action sequences with romance and drama, centering on the character Yusuf Khan, described as navigating power, love and vengeance.

title: Rao Bahadur
overview: A demon haunts a mansion in the 1970s as India changes and the aristocracy fades.

title: Red Herring
overview: When a murder mystery party reveals a dark secret, an innocent young woman finds herself in a game of cat and mouse with the rest of the players.

title: Tayo sa Wakas
overview: Upcoming Star Cinema Film. Plot TBA.

title: Pee Pressure
overview: When arts student Larry Beamish decides to take a stand against the urinary pressures of public bathrooms, he becomes an instant sensation on campus, attracting the reverence of many and the criticism of others. Reporting for the university’s TV station, tireless journalist Julia Stauber documents Beamish’s rise to fame, all while trying to maintain her cool with the station’s idiosyncratic anchor, Anvil Burnett, as well as the many colourful characters along the way

title: The Disconnection
overview: A boy goes to extreme measures to get a phone before the bullies get to him.

title: 7 Dogs
overview: Interpol agent Khalid Al-Azzazi joins forces with Ghali Abu Dawood from the 7 Dogs crime syndicate to fight drug trafficking.

title: The Death of Robin Hood
overview: Grappling with his past after a life of crime and murder, Robin Hood finds himself gravely injured after a battle he thought would be his last. In the hands of a mysterious woman, he is offered a chance at salvation.

title: The Breadwinner
overview: After his wife Katie lands a once-in-a-lifetime deal on Shark Tank that takes her on a prolonged business trip - lifelong breadwinner Nate Wilcox now has to fend for his family as a first-time stay-at-home dad.

title: Bastards: Vhere´s Majer?
overview: Bastardi: Gde Majer? is an upcoming Czech film directed by Tomáš Magnusek. It is the fifth installment in the Bastardi film series. It will premiere on May 28, 2026.

title: How to Save the Immortal. The Mystery of Living Water
overview: Three hundred years of Koshchey's search for a chosen one have finally been crowned with success, and preparations for the wedding with Varvara are in full swing. However, his cherished dream will not come true so easily, and now Koshchey, along with the Good fellow Elisha and Kolobok, embarks on a dangerous journey to save his beloved.

title: In Case We Never Meet Again
overview: Amid the war in Ukraine, Tanya and Zenit’s fragile love story unfolds, stretched between moments of closeness and conflict. Meanwhile, a group of children play war, building block posts, and imagining futures defined by violence.

title: National Theatre Live: The Playboy of the Western World
overview: Nicola Coughlan (Bridgerton) joins Éanna Hardwicke (The Sixth Commandment) and Siobhán McSweeney (Derry Girls) in John Millington Synge’s riveting play of youth and self-discovery.  Pegeen Flaherty’s life is turned upside down when a young man walks into her pub claiming that he’s killed his father. Instead of being shunned, the killer becomes a local hero and begins to win hearts, that is until a second man unexpectedly arrives on the scene…  Filmed live on stage at the National Theatre, Caitríona McLaughlin directs this darkly funny tale full to the brim with secrets.

title: Abyss
overview: Dasha and Sasha are happy newlyweds. A honeymoon and a parachute jump over the foothills of Mount Elbrus should be the beginning of their new life. But fate makes its own adjustments. The pilot turns out to be Artyom, Dasha's ex, whom she didn't even want to remember. When the plane crashes, the three of them have to jump without preparation. The slings get tangled. They miraculously stay alive — but find themselves suspended over a mountain precipice in the midst of raging forest fires. Dasha finds herself between two men, with each of whom her life is connected. One is the present. The other is the unhealed past.

title: Tod meiner Jugend
overview: A janitor with a loving wife and a devoted son leads a seemingly quiet, orderly life. One day, the boy asks his father an inconspicuous but profound question: “Dad, why are there no photos of you at my age?” Driven by a restlessness that can no longer be suppressed, the man returns to the place of his childhood: a children's home he has avoided for decades.

title: Susana and Elvira, The Movie
overview: Susana and Elvira, two former best friends, reunite after two years apart to organize the celebrity wedding of the year.

title: Haunted Universities 4
overview: Plot TBA.

title: Polong
overview: Maria Hadi tried to seek forgiveness before she died, but her defense team vented their grudge against the innocent heir.

title: My Best Friend
overview: The film will talk about women redefining their lives at 50, covering topics such as menopause, changing professions and separation.

title: Born to Fake
